title: Large Apothecary Jar with Airtight Lid in Premium Acrylic, Decorative Weddings Candy Buffet, Break-Resistant and BPA-Free, 52 Ounce
description:
About this item
This clear, durable, hard plastic jar is a perfect decorative piece to be displayed nicely on your kitchen counter, or any counter, bathroom vanity, shelf, dresser or buffet table.
Perfect for food such as candy, cookie, fruits, nuts and grains, and other dry decorations such as flowers, sand and seashells etc. Airtight lid to help preserve your stored food items.
Tastefully decorate any space in your home or business. Also perfect as a housewarming or wedding present.
Looks like glass but safe and practical! The elegant modern look is perfect for use at home, work, or restaurant.
From baking and cooking ingredients to crafting supplies, the large mouth opening allows for easy access and is easy-to-clean. 12"H x 5-1/4" Diameter and 55 oz.
› See more product details
reviews_5s: It is plastic but it looks like glass. Lid seals well, great for display, probably not so good as a container for day to day use.This is so much prettier than the pictures look. It's a nice large size, and very heavy duty plastic that looks like glass. It arrived very quickly and was packaged nicely. I reccomend this highly!I like this particular jar because it is the perfect size for my bath salts next to my tub and is acrylic, not glass, which is much safer! It makes my bath routine feel more spa-like.Finally, not too big, not too small, it's perfect in size! I love it! Well made, shipped and delivered exactly when seller said. Thank you... I should have just ordered all 12 apothecary jars from this seller!I used this at my daughter's birthday party as a candy jar and did not want anything that would break easily so I opted for plastic. The container was clear and a great option. It meet the need and looked elegant. As you can see from the pic after (forgot to take before photos) the party it was a hit and can hold plenty.Looks like glass, yet lightweight, sturdy, and attractiveLooked everywhere to find these jars. They’re hard to find. I was worried about it being plastic but I am pleasantly surprised. I almost like it better than my glass jars. I did remove the plastic ring for easy opening.When filled and placed on shelf, looks like glass instead of plastic12 I love this candy jar. It is beautiful and well-made. Displaying candy in it will make a beautiful presentation. Not only can you use it for this purpose but you can also use it to display Beauty sponges ECT. To make a beautiful display on your dresser. The possibilities are endless. I am planning on purchasing many more of these candy jars for Christmas presents.I use this on a shelf in my shower and the container keeps all the bath bombs sealed and dry. It is easily wiped dry afterwards.
reviews_1s: Broke whe I picked it upWasn’t happy at all with it returned it immediately not at all what I expected from pictureI ordered this for bath bombs and it is about a third of the size it says it is. Cheap and no gold band as shown in picture. I tried to return and Amazon only offered that I take it to a shipping location - right during Covid. I phoned them only to get a recording that they are not taking calls. Wow - protecting workers by not letting them answer the phone - genius way to generate more revenue. Don't waste your time on this if size and beauty is what is attracting you.It came with the base broken in an unopened box.Its my own fault for not better reading the description. It's ACRYLIC.Didn't use it. Didn't send it back. Just didn't like it.Looks super cheap & definitely NOT 50 ounce!Cover priced plastic I'm so highly disappointed and embarrassed I sent this as a gift and it was not at all what I expected
